## Meeting Purpose

[Weekly sync between GrowthX and Firework to discuss SEO progress, challenges, and next steps.](https://fathom.video/share/xWaumoedag2yaeX2K1shTscs2sVe-yhM?tab=summary&timestamp=1.0)

## Key Takeaways

  - [Firework is concerned about lack of tangible results (MQLs, organic traffic) after 3 months of engagement](https://fathom.video/share/xWaumoedag2yaeX2K1shTscs2sVe-yhM?tab=summary&timestamp=157.0)
  - [GrowthX reports increasing blog impressions/clicks but acknowledges need to improve lead generation](https://fathom.video/share/xWaumoedag2yaeX2K1shTscs2sVe-yhM?tab=summary&timestamp=307.0)
  - [Both parties agree on need to rapidly implement CRO tactics and increase content production](https://fathom.video/share/xWaumoedag2yaeX2K1shTscs2sVe-yhM?tab=summary&timestamp=627.0)
  - [Firework gives GrowthX \~3 weeks to show significant improvement or risk contract termination](https://fathom.video/share/xWaumoedag2yaeX2K1shTscs2sVe-yhM?tab=summary&timestamp=1944.0)

## Topics

### Current Performance Metrics

  - [GrowthX reports 30% increase in clicks, 22% increase in impressions over last 28 days](https://fathom.video/share/xWaumoedag2yaeX2K1shTscs2sVe-yhM?tab=summary&timestamp=307.0)
  - [\~80 clicks/week from new content, \~40 clicks/week from refreshed content](https://fathom.video/share/xWaumoedag2yaeX2K1shTscs2sVe-yhM?tab=summary&timestamp=420.0)
  - [Firework concerned about lack of MQLs from organic traffic](https://fathom.video/share/xWaumoedag2yaeX2K1shTscs2sVe-yhM?tab=summary&timestamp=681.0)

### Content Production & Strategy

  - [Currently producing 10-15 articles/week](https://fathom.video/share/xWaumoedag2yaeX2K1shTscs2sVe-yhM?tab=summary&timestamp=787.0)
  - [GrowthX proposes doubling production to 20-30 articles/week](https://fathom.video/share/xWaumoedag2yaeX2K1shTscs2sVe-yhM?tab=summary&timestamp=1919.0)
  - [Firework emphasizes focus on results (MQLs, traffic) over activity metrics](https://fathom.video/share/xWaumoedag2yaeX2K1shTscs2sVe-yhM?tab=summary&timestamp=706.0)

### CRO & Lead Generation Tactics

  - [GrowthX recommends implementing:](https://fathom.video/share/xWaumoedag2yaeX2K1shTscs2sVe-yhM?tab=summary&timestamp=1729.0)
      - [Sidebar widgets](https://fathom.video/share/xWaumoedag2yaeX2K1shTscs2sVe-yhM?tab=summary&timestamp=2368.0)
      - [Email capture forms](https://fathom.video/share/xWaumoedag2yaeX2K1shTscs2sVe-yhM?tab=summary&timestamp=2368.0)
      - [Pop-ups](https://fathom.video/share/xWaumoedag2yaeX2K1shTscs2sVe-yhM?tab=summary&timestamp=2368.0)
      - [Inline CTAs](https://fathom.video/share/xWaumoedag2yaeX2K1shTscs2sVe-yhM?tab=summary&timestamp=2452.0)
      - [Lead magnets (case studies, tools, reports)](https://fathom.video/share/xWaumoedag2yaeX2K1shTscs2sVe-yhM?tab=summary&timestamp=2438.0)
  - [Firework agrees to implement these tactics on new Webflow site](https://fathom.video/share/xWaumoedag2yaeX2K1shTscs2sVe-yhM?tab=summary&timestamp=1594.0)

### Website Migration & Development

  - [New Webflow site nearly complete, launch expected next week](https://fathom.video/share/xWaumoedag2yaeX2K1shTscs2sVe-yhM?tab=summary&timestamp=1101.0)
  - [Includes improved blog layout, navigation, author pages](https://fathom.video/share/xWaumoedag2yaeX2K1shTscs2sVe-yhM?tab=summary&timestamp=1112.0)
  - [GrowthX emphasizes importance of CRO elements in new design](https://fathom.video/share/xWaumoedag2yaeX2K1shTscs2sVe-yhM?tab=summary&timestamp=1140.0)

### Data & Analytics

  - [Debate over using RB2B vs. existing company-level data for visitor insights](https://fathom.video/share/xWaumoedag2yaeX2K1shTscs2sVe-yhM?tab=summary&timestamp=1434.0)
  - [GrowthX requests list of companies visiting their published content](https://fathom.video/share/xWaumoedag2yaeX2K1shTscs2sVe-yhM?tab=summary&timestamp=2226.0)
  - [Agreement to share more granular data on blog visitors and potential leads](https://fathom.video/share/xWaumoedag2yaeX2K1shTscs2sVe-yhM?tab=summary&timestamp=2253.0)

## Next Steps

  - [GrowthX to double content production (20-30 articles/week)](https://fathom.video/share/xWaumoedag2yaeX2K1shTscs2sVe-yhM?tab=summary&timestamp=1919.0)
  - [Firework to implement CRO tactics on new Webflow site (sidebar, CTAs, lead magnets)](https://fathom.video/share/xWaumoedag2yaeX2K1shTscs2sVe-yhM?tab=summary&timestamp=1594.0)
  - [Jorge to finalize Webflow site launch (expected next week)](https://fathom.video/share/xWaumoedag2yaeX2K1shTscs2sVe-yhM?tab=summary&timestamp=1101.0)
  - [Yi to share company-level visitor data for GrowthX-produced content](https://fathom.video/share/xWaumoedag2yaeX2K1shTscs2sVe-yhM?tab=summary&timestamp=2214.0)
  - [GrowthX to follow up daily with Jorge/Carolyn on implementation of requested changes](https://fathom.video/share/xWaumoedag2yaeX2K1shTscs2sVe-yhM?tab=summary&timestamp=2103.0)
  - [Team to reconvene next week to review progress and results](https://fathom.video/share/xWaumoedag2yaeX2K1shTscs2sVe-yhM?tab=summary&timestamp=2673.0)
